strengths: Meets minimum 15+ years experience requirement with documented progression across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems engineering
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, showing emerging engagement with AI platform technologies
Full-stack technical versatility across multiple languages and systems (TypeScript, Node.js, D Lang, C++, AWS CDK, Kubernetes) with demonstrated ability to choose appropriate tools
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms built; AI-agent infrastructure work is extremely recent (2 months) without evidence of recognized AI domain expertise required for the role
No advanced degree in AI-related field; entrepreneurial experience was as independent founder rather than within larger organizations as preferred

Career profile emphasizes individual technical execution and craftsman values rather than director-level strategic advisory; limited evidence of influencing enterprise product strategy or advising customers on cutting-edge adoption

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products
Current AI platform work and technical breadth
Strategic leadership and customer advisory experience

response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum experience threshold but falls significantly short on the preferred qualifications that define the role. While currently engaged with AI-agent infrastructure, there is no track record of building or shipping recognized AI products—a core requirement. Career progression demonstrates strong technical execution and teaching contributions, but the profile is stronger as an engineering craftsman than a director-level strategic advisor capable of guiding customer adoption of cutting-edge technologies. The recent pivot to AI work suggests interest but insufficient depth for a principal-level AI strategy role.
